description: Violin plot of the 2025 SPG score distribution for each of four locales (City, Suburb, Town, Rural), one density curve per row on a shared 20–100 score axis; curve width shows relative frequency, not a count.

title.subtitle: Violins show the full density curve per group — skew and double peaks a box plot would hide. Width is relative frequency, not a count.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI public accountability data (School Performance Grades), 2025. Style-guide demo.
